entry.title: 「Comet OJ - Contest #11」usiness
entry.summary:
一张笑盈盈的脸挡住了替罪羊树的去路，那不怀好意的笑容使困倦的银发少女皱了皱眉。「 sgt ，你有多长时间没打理过那些可怜的节点了？恕我直言，你的本体看上去可不是一般的斜。」

「只是我今天的 αα\alphaααα 设得比较大…」替罪羊树辩解的同时，心虚地偏了下身子试图遮住背后长歪二叉树的虚影。
entry.content:
一张笑盈盈的脸挡住了替罪羊树的去路，那不怀好意的笑容使困倦的银发少女皱了皱眉。「 sgt ，你有多长时间没打理过那些可怜的节点了？恕我直言，你的本体看上去可不是一般的斜。」

「只是我今天的 αα\alphaααα 设得比较大…」替罪羊树辩解的同时，心虚地偏了下身子试图遮住背后长歪二叉树的虚影。

「要不要尝试一下我新开展的『 splay 节点银行』服务？专为安于现状的拖延症患者设计…」伸展树伸手拉住了抬脚要走的替罪羊树，「这里支持mmm 种代存节点的方式，第 iii 种每次可以存 aia_iai​
​
个节点，并在 nnn 天后取出 bib_ibi​
​
个节点。 kdt 生日前的这 nnn 天我会一直停留在这里，每天你都可以进行任意种，每种任意次的节点存储。」她在自己的右臂上打了个标记，「绝对可靠。」

见替罪羊树一副迷惑不解的样子，伸展树挥手施放了法术，影影绰绰的画面在触手可及之处凝滞。这是一种去除强制在线的算法，因违逆了时间的自然流逝，其使用也有严格的限制。

替罪羊树看到了一帧自己囿于贫穷省吃俭用的样子，和一帧自己瘫在床上颓废的样子，发现每天结束时自己若有 iii 个节点，就能赚到 f(i)f(i)f(i) 个节点，而 f(i)f(i)f(i) 单调不增，不得不承认伸展树的正确性。但看到再之后一帧的瞬间，她面色一黑：「那么，为什么利息是负的？你能解释一下你所有的 bib_ibi​
​
都小于或等于 aia_iai​
​
的原因吗？」

「当然是因为——我帮你承担了 MLE 的风险。」伸展树煞有介事地说道。

在未引起她们注意的，更远的未来帧里，不祥的黑暗攀附在画面的一角。

你对这个种族的未来毫无兴趣，只想知道替罪羊树的最优决策，也就是说——

链接🔗

「Comet OJ - Contest #11」usiness

题解

题面很有意思的一道DP
将大于2000的值视为2001，并不会影响最后答案的结果

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <iostream>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <string>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 105;
int n,m,k;
long long dp[maxd][maxd*20],a[maxd*20],b[maxd],c[maxd];  // 第i天后，保留j节点的最大节点数
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int n,m,k;
    scanf("%d %d %d",&n,&m,&k);
    for(int i=0;i<=k;i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]);
    for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) scanf("%lld %lld",&b[i],&c[i]);
    memset(dp,-1,sizeof(dp));
    dp[1][0] = 0;
    for(int i=1;i<=n+1;i++)
    {
        for(int j=2001;j>=0;j--)
        {
            if(dp[i][j] == -1) continue;
            for(int l=1;l<=m;l++)
            {
                if(j >= b[l])
                dp[i][j-b[l]] = max(dp[i][j-b[l]],dp[i][j] + c[l]);
            }
        }
        for(int j=0;j<=2001;j++)
        {
            if(dp[i][j] == -1) continue;
            if(j+a[j] > 2000) dp[i+1][2001] = max(dp[i+1][2001],dp[i][j]+j+a[j]-2000);
            else dp[i+1][j+a[j]] = max(dp[i+1][j+a[j]],dp[i][j]);
        }
    }
    long long ans = 0ll;
    // for(int i=1;i<=n+1;i++){
    //     for(int j=0;j<=k+1;j++)
    //         printf("%lld ",dp[i][j]);
    //     putchar(10);
    // }
    for(int i=0;i<=2000;i++)
    {
        if(dp[n+1][i] == -1) continue;
        ans = max(dp[n+1][i]+i,ans);
    }
    if(dp[n+1][2001]) max(ans,dp[n+1][2000+1]+2000);
    printf("%lld",ans);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「HDU 6506」Spin A Web
entry.summary:
We have a canvas divided into grid with H rows and W columns. The square at the ith row from the top and the jth column from the left is represented as (i, j). (i, j) square has two value xi,j and yi,j .
Now we want to merge the squares to a connected web with minimal cost. Two squares can be connected if they are in the same row or column, and the cost of connecting (i0, j0) and (i1, j1) is|x_i0,j0 - xi1,j1| + |yi0,j0 - yi1,j1|
entry.content:
We have a canvas divided into grid with H rows and W columns. The square at the ith row from the top and the jth column from the left is represented as (i, j). (i, j) square has two value xi,j and yi,j .
Now we want to merge the squares to a connected web with minimal cost. Two squares can be connected if they are in the same row or column, and the cost of connecting (i0, j0) and (i1, j1) is|x_i0,j0 - xi1,j1| + |yi0,j0 - yi1,j1|

链接🔗

「HDU 6506」Spin A Web

题解

(找大佬ksf要了题解，然后做成了自己的板子)
就是曼哈顿最小生成树的板子，连边时依次对每行每列建边，最后跑一遍最小生成树即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
typedef long long ll;
const ll mod = 1e9+7;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
const int inf = 0x3f3f3f3f;
struct Point{
    int x,y,id;
    bool operator < (const Point &b) const
    { return b.x == x? y < b.y: x<b.x; }
}p[maxd],tmp[maxd];
struct Edge
{ 
    int u,v,d; 
    bool operator < (const Edge &b) const
    { return d < b.d;}
} e[maxd<<2];
int tot;
int fa[maxd],t[maxd],pos[maxd];
int gf(int x){
    if(fa[x] == x) return x;
    else return fa[x] = gf(fa[x]);
}
void update(int x,int v,int pp)
{
    for(;x; x -=(x&-x))
        if(v < t[x]) t[x] = v,pos[x] = pp;
}
int query(int x,int m)
{
    int ans = inf,pp = -1;
    for(;x<=m; x+=(x&-x))
        if(t[x] < ans)  ans = t[x], pp = pos[x];
    return pp;
}
int dis(Point a,Point b)
{
    return abs(a.x - b.x) + abs(a.y - b.y);
}
void Mannattan_minimum_spanning_tree(int n, Point p[])
{
    int a[maxd],b[maxd];
    for(int dir = 0; dir < 4;dir++)
    {
        if(dir == 1 || dir == 3) for(int i = 0;i < n;i++) swap(p[i].x,p[i].y);
        else if(dir == 2) for(int i = 0;i < n;i++) p[i].x = -p[i].x;
        sort(p,p+n);
        for(int i = 0;i < n;i++) a[i] = b[i] = p[i].y - p[i].x;
        sort(b,b+n);
        int m = unique(b,b+n) - b;
        for(int i = 1;i <= m;i++) t[i] = inf,pos[i] = -1;
        for(int i = n-1 ;i >= 0;i--)
        {
            int pos = lower_bound(b,b+m,a[i]) - b + 1;
            int ans = query(pos,m);
            if(ans != -1) e[++tot] = (Edge) {p[i].id,p[ans].id,dis(p[i],p[ans])};
            //addedge(p[i].id,p[ans].id,dis(p[i],p[ans]));

            update(pos,p[i].x+p[i].y,i);
        }
    }
}
int n,m;
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    while(scanf("%d %d",&n,&m)!=EOF)
    {
        for(int i = 1;i<=n;i++)
            for(int j = 1;j<=m;j++)
            {
                p[(i-1)*m+j].id = (i-1)*m+j;
                scanf("%d",&p[(i-1)*m+j].x);
            }
        for(int i = 1;i<=n;i++)
            for(int j = 1;j<=m;j++)
                scanf("%d",&p[(i-1)*m+j].y);
        tot = 0;
        for(int i = 1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            int C = 0;
            for(int j = 1;j<=m;j++)
                tmp[C++] = p[(i-1)*m+j];
            Mannattan_minimum_spanning_tree(C,tmp);
        }
        for(int j = 1;j<=m;j++)
        {
            int C = 0;
            for(int i = 1;i<=n;i++)
                tmp[C++] = p[(i-1)*m+j];
            Mannattan_minimum_spanning_tree(C,tmp);
        }

        for(int i=1;i<=n*m;i++) fa[i] = i;
        sort(e+1,e+tot+1);
        ll ans = 0ll;
        for(int i = 1;i <= tot;i++)
        {
            int x = gf(e[i].u) , y = gf(e[i].v);
            if(x!=y)
            {
                fa[x] = y;
                ans += e[i].d;
            }
        }
        printf("%lld\n",ans);
    }
}

entry.title: 「AtCoder 140E」 Second Sum
entry.summary:
Given is a permutation P of {1,2,…,N}\{1, 2, \ldots, N\}{1,2,…,N}.

For a pair (L,R)(1≤L<R≤N)(L, R) (1 \le L \lt R \le N)(L,R)(1≤L<R≤N), let XL,RX_{L, R}XL,R​ be the second largest value among PL,PL+1,…,PRP_L, P_{L+1}, \ldots, P_RPL​,PL+1​,…,PR​.

Find ∑L=1N−1∑R=L+1NXL,R\displaystyle \sum_{L=1}^{N-1} \sum_{R=L+1}^{N} X_{L,R}L=1∑N−1​R=L+1∑N​XL,R​.
entry.content:
Given is a permutation P of {1,2,…,N}\{1, 2, \ldots, N\}{1,2,…,N}.

For a pair (L,R)(1≤L<R≤N)(L, R) (1 \le L \lt R \le N)(L,R)(1≤L<R≤N), let XL,RX_{L, R}XL,R​ be the second largest value among PL,PL+1,…,PRP_L, P_{L+1}, \ldots, P_RPL​,PL+1​,…,PR​.

Find ∑L=1N−1∑R=L+1NXL,R\displaystyle \sum_{L=1}^{N-1} \sum_{R=L+1}^{N} X_{L,R}L=1∑N−1​R=L+1∑N​XL,R​.

链接🔗

「AtCoder 140E」 Second Sum

题解

因为想不到permutation的特性，所以想了一种很笨的办法
在主席树上二分，找到边界后，利用乘法原理统计答案

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <queue>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
int arr[maxd],id[maxd],n,l[maxd],r[maxd],ll[maxd],rr[maxd];
int ls[maxd<<4],rs[maxd<<4],sz[maxd<<4],tot,rt[maxd];
void insert(int &t,int last,int l,int r,int x)
{
    t = ++tot;  ls[t] = ls[last],rs[t] = rs[last];
    sz[t] =  sz[last]+1;
    if(l==r) return ;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(x <= mid) insert(ls[t],ls[last],l,mid,x);
    else insert(rs[t],rs[last],mid+1,r,x);
}
int query(int x,int y,int l,int r)
{
    if(sz[y] - sz[x] == 0 ) return 0;
    if(l==r) return l;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(sz[rs[y]] - sz[rs[x]]) return query(rs[x],rs[y],mid+1,r);
    else return query(ls[x],ls[y],l,mid);
}
int findl(int x,int y,int v)
{
    int ans = y;
    int l = x,r = y;
    while(l<=r)
    {
        int mid = (l+r)>>1;
        //printf("%d %d %d\n",mid,y,query(rt[mid],rt[y],1,n+2));
        if(query(rt[mid-1],rt[y],1,n) <=v) ans = mid, r = mid-1;
        else l = mid+1;
    }
    //printf("%d\n",ans);
    if(arr[ans] <= v) ans--;
    return ans;
}
int findr(int x,int y,int v)
{
    int ans = x;
    int l = x,r = y;
    while(l<=r)
    {
        int mid = (l+r)>>1;
        if(query(rt[x-1],rt[mid],1,n) <=v) ans = mid, l = mid+1;
        else r = mid-1;
    }
    if(arr[ans] <= v) ans++;
    return ans;
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d",&n);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%d",&arr[i]);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) insert(rt[i],rt[i-1],1,n,arr[i]);
    long long ans = 0ll;
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    {
        l[i] = findl(1,i,arr[i]);
        r[i] = findr(i,n,arr[i]);
        rr[i] = min(findr(r[i]+1,n,arr[i]),n+1);
        ll[i] = max(findl(1,l[i]-1,arr[i]),0);
        //printf("%d %d %d %d %d\n",ll[i],l[i],arr[i],r[i],rr[i]);
    }
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    {
        if(r[i]!=n+1) ans += 1ll*(rr[i]-r[i]) * (i-l[i]) * arr[i]; 
        if(l[i]!=0) ans += 1ll*(l[i]-ll[i]) * (r[i]-i) * arr[i];
        //printf("%d %d %lld\n",l[i],r[i],ans - last);
    }
    printf("%lld",ans);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「AtCoder 133F」Colorful Tree
entry.summary:
There is a tree with N vertices numbered 1 to N. The i-th edge in this tree connects Vertex ai and Vertex bi, and the color and length of that edge are ci and di, respectively. Here the color of each edge is represented by an integer between 1 and N−1 (inclusive). The same integer corresponds to the same color, and different integers correspond to different colors.

Answer the following Q queries:

  • Query j (1≤j≤Q): assuming that the length of every edge whose color is xj is changed to yj, find the distance between Vertex uj and Vertex vj. (The changes of the lengths of edges do not affect the subsequent queries.)
entry.content:
There is a tree with N vertices numbered 1 to N. The i-th edge in this tree connects Vertex ai and Vertex bi, and the color and length of that edge are ci and di, respectively. Here the color of each edge is represented by an integer between 1 and N−1 (inclusive). The same integer corresponds to the same color, and different integers correspond to different colors.

Answer the following Q queries:

  • Query j (1≤j≤Q): assuming that the length of every edge whose color is xj is changed to yj, find the distance between Vertex uj and Vertex vj. (The changes of the lengths of edges do not affect the subsequent queries.)

链接🔗

「Atcoder 133F」Colorful Tree

题解

根据树上差分的原理，在树上建主席树即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
struct {int v,net,col,c;}e[maxd<<1];
int f[maxd],eid;
int n,m;
int fa[maxd],son[maxd],d[maxd],tp[maxd];
int w[maxd],col[maxd],sz[maxd];
int len[maxd];
int rt[maxd],cnt,ls[maxd*40],rs[maxd*40],size[maxd*40];
int val[maxd*40];

void insert(int x,int y,int z,int l)
{
    e[eid].net = f[x];
    e[eid].v = y;
    e[eid].c = l;
    e[eid].col = z;
    f[x] = eid++;
}
void init()
{
    memset(f,-1,sizeof(f));
    eid = 0;
}
void dfs(int x,int p = 0)
{
    fa[x] = p;d[x] = d[p]+1;
    sz[x]++;
    for(int i=f[x];i+1;i=e[i].net)
    {
        int v = e[i].v;
        if(v == p) continue;
        w[v] = e[i].c;
        col[v] = e[i].col;
        len[v] = 1ll * len[x] + w[v];
        dfs(v,x);
        if(sz[v] > sz[son[x]]) son[x] = v;
        sz[x] += sz[v];
    }
}
void dfs1(int x,int p = 1)
{
    tp[x] = p;
    if(son[x]) dfs1(son[x],p);
    for(int i=f[x];i+1;i=e[i].net)
    {
        int v = e[i].v;
        if(v==fa[x]||v==son[x]) continue;
        dfs1(v,v);
    }
}
int lca(int x,int y)
{
    while(tp[x]!=tp[y])
    {
        //printf("%d %d\n",x,y);
        if(d[tp[x]] < d[tp[y]]) swap(x,y);
        x = fa[tp[x]];
    }
    //printf("%d %d\n",x,y);
    return d[x] < d[y]? x:y;
}
void insert(int &root,int last,int l,int r,int x)
{
    root = ++cnt; ls[root] = ls[last],rs[root]=rs[last];
    val[root] = 1ll * val[last] + w[x]; size[root] = size[last]+1;

    //printf("%d %d %d %d %d %d\n",root,last,l,r,x,size[root]);
    if(l==r) return;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(col[x] <= mid) insert(ls[root],ls[last],l,mid,x);
    else insert(rs[root],rs[last],mid+1,r,x);
}
int query(int root,int l,int r,int x)
{
    if(!root) return 0;
    if(l == r ) return root;
    int mid = (l+r)>>1;
    if(x <=mid) return query(ls[root],l,mid,x);
    else return query(rs[root],mid+1,r,x);
}
void build(int x)
{
    insert(rt[x],rt[fa[x]],1,n,x);
    // insert(rt[3],rt[fa[3]],1,n,3);
    // insert(rt[2],rt[fa[2]],1,n,2);
    // printf("%d\n",x);
    for(int i=f[x];i+1;i=e[i].net)
        if(e[i].v!=fa[x]) build(e[i].v);
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    init();
    scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);
    for(int i=1;i<n;i++)
    {
        int a,b,c,d;
        scanf("%d %d %d %d",&a,&b,&c,&d);
        insert(a,b,c,d); insert(b,a,c,d);
    }
    dfs(1);
    dfs1(1);

    // for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    //     printf("%d %d\n",i,son[i]);
    n++;
    col[1] = n;
    //printf("%d\n",lca(8,3));
    build(1);
    int a,b,c,d;
    // for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    // {
    //     a = query(rt[3],1,n,i);
    //     printf("%d %d %d\n",val[a],size[a],a);
    // }
    for(int i=1;i<=m;i++)
    {
        scanf("%d %d %d %d",&c,&d,&a,&b);
        int g = lca(a,b);
        int ans =  len[a] + len[b] - 2*len[g];
        //printf("%d %d ",g,c);
        g = query(rt[g],1,n,c);
        //printf("%d\n",g);
        a = query(rt[a],1,n,c);
        b = query(rt[b],1,n,c);
        //printf("%d %d %d\n",g,size[g],val[g]);
        ans += (size[a] + size[b] - 2*size[g]) * d;
        ans -= (val[a] + val[b] - 2*val[g]);
        printf("%d\n",ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「AtCoder 133E」 Virus Tree 2
entry.summary:
You are given a tree with N vertices and N−1 edges. The vertices are numbered 1 to N, and the i-th edge connects Vertex ai and bi.

You have coloring materials of K colors. For each vertex in the tree, you will choose one of the K colors to paint it, so that the following condition is satisfied:

If the distance between two different vertices x and y is less than or equal to two, x and y have different colors.
How many ways are there to paint the tree? Find the count modulo 1 000 000 007.
entry.content:
You are given a tree with N vertices and N−1 edges. The vertices are numbered 1 to N, and the i-th edge connects Vertex ai and bi.

You have coloring materials of K colors. For each vertex in the tree, you will choose one of the K colors to paint it, so that the following condition is satisfied:

If the distance between two different vertices x and y is less than or equal to two, x and y have different colors.
How many ways are there to paint the tree? Find the count modulo 1 000 000 007.

链接🔗

「AtCoder 133E」 Virus Tree 2

题解

在DFS中考虑每个节点的可选择方案数，最后统计即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
int t[maxd],flag,v[maxd];
vector<int> g[maxd];
int n,m;
const int mod =1e9+7;
void dfs(int x,int fa = 0,int d = 1)
{
    int now = m-1; 
    if(d > 2) v[x]--;
    if(v[x]<=0) 
    {
        flag=1;
        return;
    }
    //printf("%d %d\n",x,v[x]);
    for(int i=0;i<g[x].size();i++)
    {
        int k = g[x][i];
        if(k==fa) continue;
        v[k] = now;
        //printf("    %d %d\n",k,v[x]);
        dfs(k,x,d+1);
        now--;
    }
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);
    for(int i=1;i<n;i++)
    {
        int a,b;
        scanf("%d %d",&a,&b);
        g[a].push_back(b);
        g[b].push_back(a);
    }
    v[1] = m;dfs(1);
    long long ans = 1ll;
    // for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    // {
    //     printf("%d ",v[i]);
    // }
    if(flag) printf("0\n");
    else 
    {
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
            ans = 1ll*ans * v[i] %mod;
        printf("%lld\n",ans);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1007B」Pave the Parallelepiped
entry.summary:
You are given a rectangular parallelepiped with sides of positive integer lengths A, B and C.

Find the number of different groups of three integers (a, b, c) such that 1≤a≤b≤c and parallelepiped A×B×C can be paved with parallelepipeds a×b×c. Note, that all small parallelepipeds have to be rotated in the same direction.

For example, parallelepiped 1×5×6 can be divided into parallelepipeds 1×3×5, but can not be divided into parallelepipeds 1×2×3.
entry.content:
You are given a rectangular parallelepiped with sides of positive integer lengths A, B and C.

Find the number of different groups of three integers (a, b, c) such that 1≤a≤b≤c and parallelepiped A×B×C can be paved with parallelepipeds a×b×c. Note, that all small parallelepipeds have to be rotated in the same direction.

For example, parallelepiped 1×5×6 can be divided into parallelepipeds 1×3×5, but can not be divided into parallelepipeds 1×2×3.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1007B」Pave the Parallelepiped

题解

考虑将每个数的约数分组，然后再通过组合数学求出
nnn个数中放回取mmm个的不同方案数为 C(n,m)C(n,m)C(n,m)

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
long long C(int n,int m)
{
    long long ans = 1ll;
    for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) ans *= (n-i+1);
    for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) ans /= i;
    return ans;
}
int gcd(int x,int y)
{
    if(!y) return x;
    return gcd(y,x%y);
}
int fac[maxd];
void init()
{
    for(int i=1;i<maxd;i++)
        for(int j=i;j<maxd;j+=i)
            fac[j]++;
}
bool check(int a,int b,int c)
{
    if((a&1)&&(b&2)&&(c&4))
        return true;
    if((a&1)&&(c&2)&&(b&4))
        return true;
    if((b&1)&&(a&2)&&(c&4))
        return true;
    if((b&1)&&(c&2)&&(a&4))
        return true;
    if((c&1)&&(a&2)&&(b&4))
        return true;
    if((c&1)&&(b&2)&&(a&4))
        return true;
    return false;
}
int cnt[8],use[8];
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int _;scanf("%d",&_);init();
    while(_--)
    {
        int a,b,c;
        scanf("%d %d %d",&a,&b,&c);
        int ab = gcd(a,b); int bc = gcd(b,c); int ac = gcd(a,c);
        int abc = gcd(ab,c);
        cnt[7] = fac[abc]; // abc
        cnt[6] = fac[ab] - fac[abc]; // ab
        cnt[5] = fac[ac] - fac[abc];  // ac
        cnt[4] = fac[a] -cnt[6] - cnt[5] - cnt[7];  // a (a - ab - ac - abc)
        cnt[3] = fac[bc] - fac[abc]; // bc
        cnt[2] = fac[b] - cnt[3] - cnt[6] - cnt[7];      // 010 (b - bc - ab - abc)
        cnt[1] = fac[c] - cnt[5] - cnt[3] - cnt[7];     
        // for(int i=1;i<=7;i++) printf("%d ",cnt[i]);
        // putchar(10);
        long long ans = 0ll;
        for(int a=1;a<8;a++)
            for(int b=a;b<8;b++)
                for(int c=b;c<8;c++)
                    if(check(a,b,c))
                    {
                        use[a]++,use[b]++,use[c]++;

                        long long now = 1ll;
                        for(int i=1;i<8;i++)
                            if(use[i]) now *= C(cnt[i]+use[i]-1,use[i]);
                        if(now)
                        //printf("%d %d %d %lld\n",a,b,c,now);
                        ans += now;
                        use[a]--,use[b]--,use[c]--;
                    }
        printf("%lld\n",ans);
    }

    return 0;
}

entry.title: 2019 ICPC&CCPC Round Online

The Preliminary Contest for ICPC Asia Nanjing 2019 [0/9]

The Preliminary Contest for ICPC Asia Xuzhou 2019 [6/13]

The 2019 Asia Nanchang First Round Online Programming Contest[2/9]

entry.title: 「学习笔记」CRT & EXCRT
entry.summary:
给定同余方程组，其中 mim_imi​两两互质

{x≡a1(modm1)x≡b2(modm2)⋯x≡cn(modmn)\begin{cases} x≡a_1 (mod m_1) \\ x≡b_2 (mod m_2) \\ \cdots \\ x≡c_n (mod m_n) \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎪⎪⎨⎪⎪⎪⎧​x≡a1​(modm1​)x≡b2​(modm2​)⋯x≡cn​(modmn​)​
entry.content:
给定同余方程组，其中 mim_imi​两两互质

{x≡a1(modm1)x≡b2(modm2)⋯x≡cn(modmn)\begin{cases} x≡a_1 (mod m_1) \\ x≡b_2 (mod m_2) \\ \cdots \\ x≡c_n (mod m_n) \end{cases} ⎩⎪⎪⎪⎨⎪⎪⎪⎧​x≡a1​(modm1​)x≡b2​(modm2​)⋯x≡cn​(modmn​)​


我们尝试构造出一个式子，使得式子满足上列同余方程组

  • 设
  1. M=mi⋅m2⋅⋯⋅mn=∏inmiM = m_i \cdot m_2 \cdot \cdots \cdot m_n = \prod_i^n m_iM=mi​⋅m2​⋅⋯⋅mn​=∏in​mi​
  2. Mi=M/miM_i = M / m_iMi​=M/mi​
  3. ti=Mi−1,Miti=1(modmi)t_i = M_i^{-1} , M_i t_i = 1 \pmod{m_i}ti​=Mi−1​,Mi​ti​=1(modmi​)
  • 则，方程的一组通解:

x=a1t1M1+a2t2M2+⋯+antnMn+kM=∑i=1naitiMi+kMx = a_1t_1M_1 + a_2t_2M_2 + \cdots +a_nt_nM_n + kM = \sum_{i=1}^n a_it_iM_i + kM x=a1​t1​M1​+a2​t2​M2​+⋯+an​tn​Mn​+kM=i=1∑n​ai​ti​Mi​+kM

  • 证明
    根据222,我们可以得到 i!=j,Miti=0(modmi)i!=j,M_it_i = 0 \pmod{m_i}i!=j,Mi​ti​=0(modmi​)
    根据333,我们可以得到 i=j,Miti=ai(modmi)i=j,M_it_i = a_i \pmod{m_i}i=j,Mi​ti​=ai​(modmi​)
    很显然，它的循环节为MMM

  • 于是我们可以的得出，对于任意iii, x=ai(modmi)x = a_i \pmod{m_i}x=ai​(modmi​)

int CRT(int a[], int m[], int n) {
    int M = 1;
    int ans = 0;
    for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        M *= m[i];
    }
    for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        int x, y;
        int Mi = M / m[i];
        exgcd(Mi, m[i], x, y);
        ans = (ans + Mi * x * a[i]) % M;
    }
    if(ans < 0) ans += M;
    return ans;
}



为了得到tit_iti​,根据裴蜀定理，我们必须满足gcd(mi,Mi)=1gcd(m_i,M_i) =1gcd(mi​,Mi​)=1 ，但如果mim_imi​不互质，则会出现不存在tit_iti​的情况

我们考虑当前仅存在两个方程

{x≡a1(modm1)x≡b2(modm2)\begin{cases} x≡a_1 (mod m_1) \\ x≡b_2 (mod m_2) \end{cases}{x≡a1​(modm1​)x≡b2​(modm2​)​

将其转换成不定方程

x=mip+a1=m2q+a2x = m_i p + a_1 = m_2 q + a_2 x=mi​p+a1​=m2​q+a2​

m1p−m2q=a2−a1m_1p - m_2q = a_2 - a_1 m1​p−m2​q=a2​−a1​

如果 a2−a1∣gcd(m1,m2)a_2 - a_1 | gcd(m_1,m_2)a2​−a1​∣gcd(m1​,m2​) ，则可通过扩展欧几里得，得到一组可行解(p,q)(p,q)(p,q)
则两原方程的组成的新方程组解为 x=m1p(modlcm(m1,m2))x = m_1p \pmod {lcm(m_1,m_2)}x=m1​p(modlcm(m1​,m2​))

否则由裴蜀定理得知等式无解

long long crt(long long n) {
    long long M = b[1], ans = a[1], x, y;
    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {
        long long z = (a[i] - ans%b[i]+b[i])%b[i];
        long long k = exgcd(M, b[i], x, y);
        if (z % k)
            return -1;
        long long c = b[i] / k;   
        x = mul(x,z/k,c);
        ans += x * M;  
        M = M * c;
        ans = (ans%M+M)%M;
    }
    return (ans % M + M) % M;
}

entry.title: 2019 Multi-University Training Contest
entry.content:
2019 Multi-University Training Contest 1 [5/13]

  • A. Blank [DP]*
  • B. Operation [线性基]
  • C. Milk [离散化+背包+思维]
  • D. Vacation[签到]
  • E. Path[最短路+最小割]
  • F. Typewriter[SAM]
  • G. Meteor[数学]
  • H. Desert[不太可做]
  • I. String[贪心]*
  • J. Kingdom[区间DP]
  • K. Function[数论]
  • L. Sequence[数学]
  • M.Code[计算几何]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 2 [8/12]

  • A. Another Chess Problem [组合数学+思维]
  • B. Beauty Of Unimodal Sequence [DP]*
  • C. Coefficient [数学]
  • D. Double Tree [树分治]
  • E. Everything Is Generated In Equal Probability [期望]
  • F. Fantastic Magic Cube[FWT]*
  • G. Game [博弈]
  • H. Harmonious Army[网络流]
  • I. I Love Palindrome String[字符串]
  • J. Just Skip The Problem[签到]
  • K. Keen On Everything But Triangle[线段树 or 主席树]
  • L. Longest Subarray[线段树]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 3 [5/11]

  • A. Azshara's deep sea [几何.凸包]
  • B. Blow up the city [支配树]
  • C. Yukikaze and Demons [树上问题.分治]
  • D. Distribution of books [二分+数据结构优化DP]
  • E. Easy Math Problem [数论]
  • F. Fansblog [打表找规律]
  • G. Find the answer [数据结构]
  • H. Game [三维莫队]
  • I. K Subsequence [dijkstra费用流]
  • J. Sindar's Art Exhibition [树链剖分]
  • K. Squrirrel [DP]*

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 4 [3/11]

  • A. AND Minimum Spanning Tree [签到]
  • B. Colored Tree
  • C. Divide the Stones [构造]*
  • D. Enveloping Convex
  • E. Good Numbers[数位DP + 卷积]
  • F. Horse[DP]*
  • G. Just an Old Puzzle [找规律]
  • H. K-th Closest Distance [主席树]
  • I. Linear Functions
  • J. Minimal Power of Prime [数学]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 5 [1/10]

  • A. fraction[数学]
  • B. three arrays [思维]
  • C. geometric problem[不太可做]
  • D. equation [数学+思维]
  • E. permutation 1[签到,搜索]*
  • F. string matching [Exkmp]
  • G. permutation 2 [找规律]
  • H. line symmetric [几何]
  • I. discrete logarithm problem [Pohlig Hellman]
  • J. find hidden array[用力猜？]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 6 [3/10]

  • A. Salty Fish[网络流+启发式合并]
  • B. Nonsense Time [暴力+LIS]
  • C. Milk Candy[图论]
  • D. Speed Dog [数论]*
  • E. Snowy Smile[离散化+数据结构]*
  • F. Faraway [暴力+思维]*
  • G. Support or Not [不太可做的样子]
  • H. TDL[签到]
  • I. Three Investigators[不太可用的样子]
  • J. Ridiculous Netizens[树上问题]
  • K. 11 Dimensions[DP]
  • L. Stay Real[贪心]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 7[2/10]

  • A. A + B = C [模拟]
  • B. Bracket Sequences on Tree[树上问题]
  • C. Cuber Occurrence[后缀自动机 + 主席树]
  • D. Data Structure Problem [计算几何]
  • E. Equation [数论]
  • F. Final Exam [签到]
  • G. Getting Your Money Back [DP]
  • H. Halt Hater[大讨论]
  • I. Intersection of Prisms[积分+计算几何]
  • J. Just Repeat[博弈+贪心]
  • K. Kejin Player [期望DP]

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 8[0/11]

  • A. Acesrc and Cube Hypernet
  • B. Acesrc and Girlfriend
  • C. Acesrc and Good Numbers
  • D. Acesrc and Hunting
  • E. Acesrc and String Theory
  • F. Acesrc and Travel
  • G. Andy and Data Structure
  • H. Andy and Maze
  • I. Calabash and Landlord
  • J. Quailty and CCPC
  • K. Roundgod and Milk Tea

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 9[0/11]

  • A. Rikka with Quicksort
  • B. Rikka with Cake
  • C. Rikka with Mista
  • D. Rikka with Geometric Sequence
  • E. Rikka with Game
  • F. Rikka with Coin
  • G. Rikka with Travels
  • H. Rikka with Stable Marriage
  • I. Rikka with Traffic Light
  • J. Rikka with Defensive Line
  • K. Rikka with Segment Tree

2019 Multi-University Training Contest 10[0/11]

  • B. Line Graphs
  • C. Valentine's Day
  • D. Play Games with Rounddog
  • E. Welcome Party
  • F. Dense Subgraph
  • G. Closest Pair of Segments
  • H. Coins
  • I. Block Breaker
  • J. Domino Covering
  • K. Make Rounddog Happy
